context.projectOverview: Fleet Expand — Phase 2 of the fleet orchestrator. Sprint 2 of 2: wire Sprint 1's decomposeGoal into a `fleet expand <goal>` Commander subcommand that builds the DeepSeek client (credential fail-fast BEFORE any write), calls decomposeGoal, assembles { rootDir, concurrency, children }, atomically writes it to <root>/.bober/fleet-expand.json (overwrite + notice), prints it + a review hint, and STOPS by default — chaining into the locked Phase 1 runFleet(outPath) only when --yes is passed.

completedSprints.title: FleetDecomposer module
completedSprints.summary: src/fleet/decomposer.ts exports decomposeGoal({goal, client, model, maxRetries}): Promise<FleetManifest> — children-only Zod-valid manifest via one DeepSeek jsonObjectMode call + 1 coercion retry + per-child config-key guard. Commit 4c1dc09.

relevantFiles: src/fleet/index.ts (runFleet ~88 + FleetDeps; registerFleetCommand ~133 — PRESERVE the `fleet <manifest>` registration BYTE-IDENTICAL; Fleet Summary print block)
src/cli/index.ts (registerFleetCommand call site; registerWorktreeCommand parent+child attachment pattern)
src/providers/factory.ts (createClient + validateApiKey fail-fast on missing DEEPSEEK_API_KEY)
src/state/run-state.ts (atomic temp+rename write helper + mkdir-recursive to mirror)

principles: See .bober/principles.md — ESM with .js import extensions; provider-agnostic (no SDK import outside providers/); Zod validation; async fs only (node:fs/promises, no *Sync); `import type` (consistent-type-imports); no explicit any (unknown + narrowing); unused params prefixed `_`; unicode box-drawing section comments; conventional commits, sprint commits `bober(sprint-N): description`.
notes: Read the Sprint Briefing FIRST: .bober/briefings/sprint-spec-20260617-fleet-expand-decomposer-2-briefing.md. LOAD-BEARING SAFETY INVARIANTS: (1) credential fail-fast — createClient/validateApiKey must throw on missing DEEPSEEK_API_KEY BEFORE any manifest file is written; (2) the default (no --yes) path must NEVER call runFleet/spawn — runFleet is reachable ONLY under opts.yes; (3) the existing `fleet <manifest>` `.command(...)`/`.action(...)` registration lines must stay BYTE-IDENTICAL. Factor the action body into an exported testable `runFleetExpand(goal, opts, deps?)` (deps inject decomposeGoal, runFleet, and the client builder) mirroring how runFleet takes FleetDeps, so tests avoid real network/spawn and use a temp dir for the out path. Atomic write = temp + rename, mkdir recursive async. Default outPath = opts.out ?? <root>/.bober/fleet-expand.json; print an overwrite notice when the target already existed.
